top_tweets.text:
Boss #Sandrone 2⃣
Design Reference: Seth Nightroad
#GenshinImpact https://t.co/unjzP4QkEf
top_tweets.author: youjee679
top_tweets.name: Youjee
top_tweets.summary_zh: 有經驗的設計師擁有上千種用詞語表達設計意圖的簡語（如「收緊間距」、「增加行距」、「修正層級」），這正是 AI 在設計上表現不佳的原因之一——多數人不擅長用精確語言描述設計需求。

top_tweets.text:
Obsidian is usually placed in the same category as Notion, Apple Notes, Roam, or any other app where people collect thoughts.

That comparison is useful at the interface level, but it hides the more important design choice.

Obsidian’s central object is not a workspace hosted https://t.co/GcZ5hF5K2j
top_tweets.author: techNmak
top_tweets.name: Tech with Mak
top_tweets.summary_zh: Obsidian 常被拿來跟 Notion、Apple Notes 等筆記工具比較，但真正的設計差異在於：Obsidian 的核心物件不是雲端託管的工作區，而是本地檔案系統，這是更根本的架構選擇。

top_tweets.text:
if you want claude to be able to make slides for you, don't use claude design, use revealjs and have claude make them with html and markdown

it's such a nice experience https://t.co/mhX8YUKoOM
top_tweets.author: RhysSullivan
top_tweets.name: Rhys
top_tweets.summary_zh: 想讓 Claude 幫你做簡報，別用 Claude 內建設計功能，改用 reveal.js 搭配 HTML 和 Markdown，體驗會好很多。

top_tweets.text: FINALLY a complete ground up redesign of the UI for MW4 instead of basically the same general design with some changes from one year to the next. This may seem minor but it goes a long way to making a game feel truly unique. I'm just hoping navigating this UI will be solid. https://t.co/VpYtw3EQ7w
top_tweets.author: TheXclusiveAce
top_tweets.name: Xclusive Ace
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《決勝時刻 MW4》終於從底層重新設計 UI，而非像過去每年只是微調同一套設計；這看似細節，但對遊戲的獨特性體驗影響很大，期待導航體驗也能跟上。

top_tweets.text:
There a HUGE lesson here.

Dino and his team at Saronic didn’t design a new, exquisite hull to answer a specific set of obsolete mission requirements. They took a time-tested, highly-successful commercial design—an oil field service boat—and adapted it for a new mission.

The https://t.co/0YzsfNVEYc
top_tweets.author: TimOnPoint
top_tweets.name: TimOnPoint
top_tweets.summary_zh: Saronic 團隊沒有為過時需求設計全新船體，而是採用經過市場驗證的商用油田服務船設計，並針對新任務改裝——這是重要的產品開發思維。

top_tweets.text: I actually kinda enjoy the gen 1 vs gen 9 conversation since it gets people thinking about what actually makes a character design successful and creates interesting debates and helps us learn about design philosophies and biases. https://t.co/LeP9pD7XxQ
top_tweets.author: _Archesuchus_
top_tweets.name: 🍉Archesuchus🪶
top_tweets.summary_zh: 第一代 vs 第九代寶可夢設計的討論，能引發對「什麼讓角色設計成功」的思考，幫助我們理解不同設計哲學與偏好。

top_tweets.text: Apple, if you're not doing this, we need to talk. 👀🔌 https://t.co/Ijli3y8bEn
top_tweets.author: shariar_design
top_tweets.name: SHARIAR
top_tweets.summary_zh: Apple 若還沒做這件事（推文附有某種充電設計概念圖），我們需要談談。

top_tweets.text:
need people to grasp how lucky we are that Backrooms is as weird & indulgent as it is. it was a guaranteed hit; they could’ve so easily half-assed it or played it safer

letting him design every set down to the smallest detail in blender is crazy. lynch would’ve killed for that!
top_tweets.author: wreckette
top_tweets.name: hazel norwood
top_tweets.summary_zh: 《Backrooms》系列能如此怪誕且自我放縱是很幸運的——它本可輕鬆成為爆款卻選擇不妥協；讓創作者在 Blender 中親自設計每個場景細節到最小程度，連 Lynch 都會羨慕這種創作自由。

top_tweets.text:
Hot take: Given $MSFT laptops/PCs are now likely using $NVDA hardware. 

They might have a shot of taking down $AAPL.

Only if Windows OS UI weren’t a flaming pile of garbage compared to how clean Apple OS is.

You would think a $3T company would know better UI design by now? https://t.co/OvysxCN21i
top_tweets.author: aleabitoreddit
top_tweets.name: Serenity
top_tweets.summary_zh: 微軟筆電現在可能採用 NVIDIA 硬體，有機會挑戰 Apple，但前提是 Windows UI 不再像垃圾堆一樣醜——一家 3 兆美元公司理應懂得更好的 UI 設計。

top_tweets.text: IO Interactive is really good at representing hoity toity rich people shit in their level design and also making it clear how boorish it is
top_tweets.author: BoneJail
top_tweets.name: Rory Blank
top_tweets.summary_zh: IO Interactive 擅長在關卡設計中呈現上流社會的浮誇排場，同時也清楚展現其中的粗俗本質。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.author: Kim
top_products.summary_zh: 以 AI 驅動的書籤管理工具，協助使用者整理與檢索瀏覽器收藏的網頁內容。

top_products.title: Oura Ring 5
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: The world’s smallest smart ring, now even better
top_products.summary_zh: 世界上最小的智慧戒指新版本，用於追蹤健康數據與生理指標。
